prompt: Build a /orders page with MudDataGrid using ServerData (with cancellation token), sortable columns (OrderId, CustomerName, Total $-formatted, CreatedAt yyyy-MM-dd), debounced search (300ms) by customer name, pagination (10/25/50/100), and a per-row View button that opens a confirmation dialog showing the order ID.

assertions.text: Orders.razor declares @rendermode InteractiveServer (or similar interactive render mode)
Orders.razor uses MudDataGrid<Order> (typed) with T explicitly set or inferred
The ServerData delegate accepts a CancellationToken (the v9 signature) and ideally passes it through to OrderService.QueryAsync
The toolbar contains a search MudTextField with DebounceInterval="300" (or 300ms equivalent) wired to ReloadServerData on debounce
The grid has PropertyColumns for OrderId, CustomerName, Total (with currency Format), and CreatedAt (with yyyy-MM-dd Format)
The grid has a MudDataGridPager with PageSizeOptions including 10, 25, 50, 100
The grid has a TemplateColumn (or action column) with a per-row View button that opens a dialog
Dialog opening uses await DialogService.ShowAsync (the v9 async API), not Show
A separate dialog .razor component is created (or an inline dialog used) that displays the order ID
